title: Jamaican Saltfish Fritters
description: A traditional Jamaican dish made with saltfish, onions, and spices, served as a crispy fritter. Enjoy these delicious bites as a snack or light meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine saltfish, onions, peppers, and hash browns.
Add a pinch of salt to taste, and mix well.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small patties.
Heat a non-stick pan with a small amount of oil over medium heat.
Fry the patties for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Serve hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
